titleStmt.title: SII 24.373: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 373. (A.R. No. 42 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift by Kandāḍai Mādhavayyaṅgār of 80 poṉ of gold, the interest on which is to be spent towards special offerings to god Raṅganātha on the second day of the Brahmōtsava while he halts at Mādhavayyaṅgār Tiruttōppumaṇḍapa and on the fifth day of the Māśi festival instituted in the name of Kṛishṇadēva-Mahārāya when the god halts at the garden adjoining Pradhāni Timmarasar-tōppu. The date of the record Śaka 1442, Mīna, śu, 5, Wednesday, Rōhiṇī corresponds regularly to 1521, A.D. March 13, Wednesday, ·40, ·89.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 4 100 4 10 2- ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa vikkiṟama samvatsarattu minaṉāyaṟṟu puṟuvapakṣattu pañcamiyum budhavāramum peṟṟa rohiṇi nāḷ tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati śrīraṅkanārāyaṇajiyarum Aṉaittu kottu tāṉikarum
Ittiruppati vikkiṟamacoḻaṉ tiruviti teṟkut tiruviti kiḻtuṇṭattil kantāṭai Irāmaānujayyaṅkār rāmaāṉuja kūṭattukku kaṟttarāṉa Irāmānujayyaṅkār śiṣyar kantāṭai mādhavayyaṅkāṟku poliyūṭṭu cilāśāsanam paṇṇi kuṭuttapaṭi .
perumāḷukku tammuṭaiya Upayamāka ciṟappu kaṭṭaḷai paṇṇina Ādibrahmāviṉ tirunāḷ Iraṇṭān tirunāḷil mādhavayyaṅkār tiruttoppu maṇṭapattil Eḻuntaruḷukaiyil ciṟappuk kaṭṭaḷai taḷikai 5 10 Adhirasam 3 100 vaṭai 3 100 poriyamutu 6 100 veccamutu kūṉ 5 10 Āka Ivva
kaikku Amutupaṭi paruppamutu neyyamutu kaṟiyamutu vellam campāram Erikarumpu Aṭaikkāyamutu Ilaiyamutu kaḷvaprasāda viniyogam parivaṭṭam kaṭṭum vakai Uḷppaṭṭa vakai śrī paṇṭārattile viṭṭu naṭattumpaṭikku tām
poliyūṭṭāka mutaliṭṭa poṉ 4 10— m pradhāni timmarasartoppu Aśvatthatīrttha tuṟaikku melaittoppu maṇṭapattil kṛṣṇadevamahārāyar mācittiruṉāḷ Añcān tiruṉāḷil Eṟi Aruḷukaiyil ciṟappuk kaṭṭaḷai
taḷikai 5 10 Ati sam 3 100 vaṭai 3 100 pori Amutu 6 100 veccamutu kūṉ 5 10— Āka Ivvakaikku Amutupaṭi paruppamutu neyyamutu kaṟiyamutu campāram Erikarumpu vellam Aṭaikkāyamutu Ilaiyamutu kaḷvaprasāda viniyogam
Iḷanir Amutu Uḷppaṭṭa vakaikku poli Ūṭṭāka mutaliṭṭa poṉ 4 10 Ākac ciṟappu Iraṇṭukkum poliūṭṭāka Iṟṟaināḷ tāyRead tām śrīpaṇṭārattil mutaliṭṭa poṉ 8 10 Intappoṉ Eṇpatiṉ vṛddhikkuc cilavāka
Intac ciṟappuk kaṭṭaḷaippaṭi śrīpaṇṭārattilum viṭṭu Ācandrārkkasthāyiyāka naṭattak kaṭavutākavum . śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 24.373 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
